whatsnew: Performance: Added cache hit-rate telemetry — per-dashboard counters (fresh vs cached) now logged and persisted for historical analysis
Settings: New Cache Performance panel shows current session, last 24h, and last 7d cache hit rates
Settings: Configurable query concurrency sliders (Heavy TimeSeries, Light Stat/Grid) — adjust to match server capacity
Dashboard: Panels now display a subtle "Cached" badge during preload, so users see when data is from cache vs fresh
Dashboard: Preload-from-cache now tracks which panels are stale; badge clears as fresh data arrives
Metrics: New CacheMetricsService stores retrieval history in SQLite for trend analysis
Engine: CachingQueryExecutor instrumented with thread-safe counters (total, fresh, cache hits)
Throttling: QueryThrottleService reads limits from UserSettings and supports runtime UpdateLimits()
UX: Fixed ScheduledTasks page API mismatches (GetConnections, ExecuteQueryAsync, ServerNames property)
UX: Fixed DynamicPanel markup structure and added IsCached parameter propagation
Release: Updated publish-release.ps1 naming from LiveMonitor to SQLTriage throughout
